content: This rule describes meta information of generic data type generator. This also acts as a guide for pattern definition to generate code in Go. All of the patterns described here should be fault tolerant, which means it should be okay if the definition makes small mistakes, as long as it is understandable.
Identity represents a new type definition of ``uuid.UUID`` from the library ``github.com/google/uuid``.

Enumerated String represents a new type definition of string and some constants with these types. The constants are defined in CamelCase prefixed by the type name, and the values are written in snake case. You can also specify a default value.
The default constant can be used for initialization, zero-value checks, or validation helpers.
